package rulecoverage

func PositiveStringsCompareEqualZero() string {
    ruleID := "strings_compare_equal_zero"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`strings.Compare(...) == 0` instead of direct string equality."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
